description: Triangulate faces of rigid blocks to increase the number of vertices on a face. If no keyword is supplied, the minimum number of triangles are created.

keywords.name: edge-max
keywords.description: Set the maximum edge length to f .

keywords.name: radial
keywords.description: Add a center vertex to all faces.

keywords.name: radial-8
keywords.description: Add a center vertex and mid-edge vertices to all faces.
